name: Kampala
notes: Treated by UBOS as its own sub-region-equivalent (separate 'Kampala Capital City' census profile), not nested under Buganda.

name: Madi
notes: UBOS 2024 census treats Madi as its own sub-region, split out from the broader West Nile grouping used in older sources.

name: Rwenzori
notes: UBOS 2024 census treats Rwenzori as its own sub-region, split from Tooro (Rwenzururu/Bwamba traditional institutions became independent of the Tooro kingdom in 1993).

name: Sebei
notes: UBOS 2024 census treats Sebei as its own sub-region, split out from the broader Bugisu grouping used in older sources.
